## Unmodified Input Pictures

Please upload unmodified input pictures (photos taken of a Game Boy Camera image on a Game Boy Advance SP screen). These should **NOT be cropped or rotated** - just the raw photo as taken.

**Guidelines for input pictures:**

- Photo of a Game Boy Camera image displayed on a Game Boy Advance SP screen (AGS-001 or AGS-101)
- Approximately centered Game Boy screen with some dark bezel visible
- Clear focus showing individual pixels
- Ideally taken in a dark room with the GBA SP frontlight on
- Frame 02 is recommended for consistency

**Upload here:**

## Reference Images

Please upload reference images (128x112 perfect Game Boy Camera output images in the four-color palette).

**Guidelines for reference images:**

- Exactly 128x112 pixels
- Four-color grayscale palette:
  - `0` (black, #000000)
  - `82` (dark gray, #9494FF on screen)
  - `165` (light gray, #FF9494 on screen)
  - `255` (white, #FFFFA5 on screen)
- Must be perfectly accurate reproductions of the input pictures
- PNG format recommended

**How to create reference images:**
You need special hardware to extract perfect Game Boy Camera images. See [the Game Boy Camera Export Methods wiki](https://funtography.online/wiki/Exporting_images_from_the_Game_Boy_Camera) for options.

**Upload here:**
